item.title: A quiet night that changed her story
item.description: A key detail from that night still matters in this true crime and survivor story, as the case continues to center on justice.

item.title: Ellie Butler’s timeline doesn’t add up
item.description: A closer look at Ellie Butler’s case raises questions about shifting details and a timeline that doesn’t fully align.

item.title: The post that cracked this case open
item.description: One detail in a viral post sent the investigation in a new direction.
